titleStmt.title: SII 19.453: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao, Dines Chandra Sircar and G.S. Gai
No. 453. (A.R. No. 128 of 1911.) TIRUVARĀMĪŚVARAM, MANNARGUDI TALUK, TANJAVUR DISTRICT. ON THE SOUTH WALL OF THE maṇḍapa IN FRONT OF THE CENTRAL SHRINE, RĀMANĀTHĒŚVARA TEMPLE.

summary.p: This records an agreement given by four servants of the temple of Tiruvirāmīśvaram at Madanamañjari-chaturvēdimaṅgalam a brahmadēya village in Nenmali-nāḍu, to maintain a perpetual lamp in the temple for a landgift of 48 kuḻi of land at Neḍumaṇal, and a cash payment of 10 kaḻañju of gold received by them from Ūraṉ Brahma-Kuttaṉ a merchant residing in the Vīraśōḻaperunderuvu at Tañjāvūr. Like No. 350. above, this may also be assigned to Uttama-Chōḷa's reign.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . koparakecaripanmarkku yāṇṭu nenmalināṭ brahmateyam matanamañcaricaturvvetima
ṅkalattu tiruvirāmiśvarattu tiruko� makaṉ loccaṉ nampirāṉaṭikaḷ tiruvirāmiśvaraṉum Ālaca
ṉ can=tiracekaraṉ veṇkāṭatevaṉum pāratāyaṉ paṉaraka cāttaṉum kaviṇiyaṉ Āccaṉ caṉtiracekaraṉum
Iññālvom tañcāvūr viracoḻapperunteruvil viyāpāri Ūran prahmakuṭṭan Ittiruvirāmiśva
rattu mahādevarkku Oru ṉontāviḷakku ku m pon Ivvūrk kallāl patiṉkaḻañcum
nilam neṭumaṇal nattattu rājakecarivatikku meṟkkum suprahmaṇya nārāyattukku vaṭakku kiḻakkuniṉṟum muṉṟā
ñciṟakil teṟkkuniṉṟum Iraṇṭāñcatukkattu vaṭakkaṭaiya patiṉāṟu kuḻiyum mu(ṟa)ṉṟā ñcatukkattukkuḻi muppattiraṇṭum
Āka kuḻi nāṟppatteṭṭu Ikkuḻiyāl vanta nilamum Ippoṉ patiṉkaḻaiñcum nāṅkaḷ koṇṭamaiyil Innilattil
bhogattālum Ippoṉniṉ palicaiyālum Ittevarkku Oru nontāviḷakku candrādittaval Ikkoyilil Eṅkaḷ paṇiye
yoṟṟiyāka muntiṟomey nondāviḷakkerippomānom Iṉnālvom Itu paṉmāheśvarar rakṣai [.]
Digital edition of SII 19.453 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Emmanuel Francis.
